title: Building an AI app: A low-code guide for small teams
summary: Google Cloud offers low-code development tools for building AI applications with natural language interfaces and hybrid search capabilities. The platform leverages Cloud SQL, AlloyDB for PostgreSQL, and Gemini to enable small teams without AI expertise to deploy intelligent apps quickly.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video walks through building AI applications with low-code tools aimed at small teams that lack dedicated AI expertise. It covers natural language interfaces and hybrid search built on Cloud SQL, AlloyDB for PostgreSQL, and Gemini. The takeaways center on AI-assisted development with auto-generated code, plus semantic and vector search, to deploy intelligent apps quickly.
